# Review Checklist

- Scope is respected.
- Rules are respected.
- Workflow Rev.2 Trial status is respected when applicable.
- Current Focus has a clear resume point.
- `run_all.py` is verified when required.
- `tool.py health` is verified when required.
- schema validation is verified when required.
- README updates are complete when required.
- Docs updates are complete when required.
- Queue updates are complete when required.
- Current Focus updates are complete when required.
- Retrospective need is checked.
- Suggested commit message is clear.
